memoryArtifacts.headline: Possible Missing Children
memoryArtifacts.description:
I have a very old family group sheet that lists 7 children:
1. Richard Bonville  b. abt. 1360, Chewton, Devon, England
2. Elizabeth Bonville   b. abt. 1362, Chewton, Devon, England, md. Thomas Carew
3 …

zh.Woodbury, St. Thomas, Devon, England: 英國戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret d'Aumarle於1343年出生在英國戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓時，她的父親William d'Aumarle23歲，母親Agnes Helen de Meriet16歲。她於大約1359年與Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年5月25日在英國戴文金斯布利其享年56歲，埋葬在英國戴文金斯布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret d'Aumarle于1343年出生在英国戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓时，她的父亲William d'Aumarle23岁，母亲Agnes Helen de Meriet16岁。她于大约1359年与Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年5月25日在英国戴文金斯布利其享年56岁，埋葬在英国戴文金斯布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret d'Aumarle was born in 1343, in Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England, her father, William d'Aumarle, was 23 and her mother, Agnes Helen de Meriet, was 16. She married Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff about 1359, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 May 1399, in Kingsbridge, Devon, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret d'Aumarle est née en 1343, à Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aumarle, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes Helen de Meriet, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff environ 1359, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1399, à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret d'Aumarle 1343 in Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aumarle 23 und ihre Mutter Agnes Helen de Meriet 16. Sie hat um 1359 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Mai 1399 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kingsbridge, Devon, England und wurde in Kingsbridge, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret d'Aumarle è nata il nel 1343 nel Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England, sua padre, William d'Aumarle, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Agnes Helen de Meriet, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff circa 1359, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1399, nel Kingsbridge, Devon, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Aumarleが1343年にイギリスデボンウッドブリー ウィス エクストンで生まれた時，父William d'Aumarleは23歳，母Agnes Helen de Merietは16歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1399年5月25日にイギリスデボンキングスブリッジで56歳で死去し，イギリスデボンキングスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Aumarle(이)가 1343년 영국 데폰 우드버이 위스 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aumarle(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Helen de Meriet(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 5월 25일 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret d'Aumarle nasceu em 1343, em Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aumarle, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Helen de Meriet, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff aproximadamente 1359, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de maio de 1399, em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret d'Aumarle родилась в 1343 г. в местности вудбури вит экстон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aumarle было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Helen de Meriet, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff около 1359 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 мая 1399 г. в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret d'Aumarle nació en 1343, en Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William d'Aumarle, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnes Helen de Meriet, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff aproximadamente 1359, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1399, en Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra.
